heading: Today
text: Periods of sun through smokey haze, mixing with afternoon clouds.  A rising chance of afternoon showers or a thunderstorm through Quebec into northeast VT and northern NH, scattered south to the Adirondacks and Rt. 4.  Highs in the 70s to low 80s north, in the 80s south.  Winds shifting from southwest to northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A stray evening shower or thunderstorm, then clearing.  Lows in the 50s, a few upper 40s in northern cool spots.  Winds northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, diminishing to light in sheltered valleys.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly sunny.  Highs in the 70s north, 80 to 85 south.  Winds northwest near 10 mph.
